src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Replace deprecated ObjectMapper constructor with JsonMapper builder pattern to align with current Jackson best practices.
Enable PROPAGATE_TRANSIENT_MARKER to ensure transient fields are handled consistently during serialization/deserialization.
Remove obsolete manual parent restoration logic now that Jackson annotations handle bidirectional references automatically.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.human_impl: // restoreParents(newRoot); // not necessary anymore thanks to @JsonManagedReference/@JsonBackReference

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Comment out unused utility method restoreParents to clean up the codebase.
Remove commented-out debug/test code for adding sub-nodes.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add JsonManagedReference annotation to handle bidirectional relationships in JSON serialization.
Replace generic @JsonIgnore with @JsonBackReference to explicitly handle bidirectional parent-child serialization cycles.
Moved @JsonIgnore annotation from changeListeners to certificateHandling to ensure correct JSON serialization behavior.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.human_impl: Removed @JsonIgnore from changeListeners and added it to certificateHandling.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Updated @SuppressWarnings annotation to use 'removal' instead of 'deprecation' for the finalize method, aligning with Java 9+ semantics where finalize is marked for removal.
